title: Create/Cobblemon: Greninja Frogport
description: A small resource pack that retextures the frogport of the "Create" mod to look like a Greninja.
body:
### Retextures the frogport of the mod "Create" to look like the Pokemon "Greninja".
Logically the pack requires [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) or [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) to affect anything.

It's just a fun little resource pack ideal for modpacks that try to combine Create and [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon).
_________________________________________________________________

**Terms of use:**
As long as you don't put this behind a paywall of any kind you can use, modify, redistribute etc. it however you want.
